title: Wynnic Elemental Tooltips
description: Element-themed Legendary Tooltips pack for Wynncraft
body:
THIS IS DISCONTINUED!!! Obviously because Wynncraft now has very custom tooltips built in. It was a nice idea while it lasted!

[Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips) integration for [Wynncraft](https://wynncraft.com)

Requires [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips), obviously.

Attempts to match an element-themed border to an item. For accessories and weapons, this is done by checking the texture of the item. For armor, the skill requirements are checked, but results may be biased towards Earth/Thunder. Not all matches are guaranteed to be correct. Equipping a skin on a piece of weapon/armor will usually remove this border.

Includes element borders for:
- Accessories
- Weapons
- Armor
- Powder
- Skill Books

Includes extra borders for:
- Ability Tree
- Runes
- Emeralds
- Emerald Pouches
- Potions
- Content Book

Includes additional themes that apply tooltips to all items:
